---
title: "Announcement"
page-layout: article
toc: true
---

The **Concept and Application of Bioactive Molecules (CAMBio) Laboratory**, in partnership with the **National Higher School of Biotechnology (ENSB) – Taoufik Khaznadar**, cordially invites researchers, academics, doctoral students, and professionals to submit original research contributions to the

## **1st Hybrid National Seminar on Bioactive Molecules (NSBM26)**

### *From Characterization to Innovative Biotechnological Applications*

Join us in sharing cutting-edge research, innovative technologies, and interdisciplinary perspectives that advance the science and applications of bioactive molecules. Accepted contributions will be presented during the seminar through **oral or poster presentations**, providing an excellent opportunity to exchange ideas and build new scientific collaborations.

For complete submission guidelines, important dates, and participation details, please download the official **Call for Papers**.

<br>

[⬇️ Download the Call for Papers](files/Fich.docx){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
